_note: FABRICATED. Generic placeholder companies (Company A / B / etc.) intentionally used in this file instead of the cohort's real names, because forward-looking claims (ARR figures, named customer wins, raise plans) about real portfolio companies would be misleading or potentially defamatory even with a disclaimer. The other sample_inputs files use real names because they reflect public-record data; this file is structural only.
subject: Company A investor update Q1 2026
highlights: Crossed $16M ARR (up from $9M YoY)
Signed a top-5 customer in the category on a multi-year contract
AI optimization feature live with majority of base; meaningful efficiency gains
risk_flags: Long enterprise sales cycle (9-14 months); pipeline coverage at 3.1× target
Incumbent competitor cutting prices aggressively on renewals
ask: Warm intros to category buyers would accelerate next-year pipeline

subject: Company B Q1 2026 investor update
highlights: Crossed $113M ARR (up from $86M YoY)
Launched adjacent vertical (early traction, ~$2M ARR in first quarter)
Hired CFO from a public-market comp
risk_flags: Public-market comp multiple compression (~4-5× revenue) compressing private valuations
Adjacent-category platform shift affecting customer attribution
ask: Looking for warm intros to enterprise health benefits buyers

risk_flags: Returns rate on new hardware elevated in first 60 days (likely transient)
